welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Create and personalize your new assistant

personality.title: PERSONALITY
personality.subtitle: Assistant Behavior and Tone
personality.custom_personality_placeholder: E.g.: Sarcastic and rebellious like a space pirate...
personality.custom_personality_hint: Define exactly how you want the system to behave.

status.title: OPERATIONAL STATUS
status.subtitle: User Level and Assistant Autonomy
status.goal_placeholder: Describe what you want to achieve...

protocol.title: PROTOCOL
protocol.subtitle: User Context and Assistant Rules
protocol.bio_example: Example: 'I'm a web developer', 'I work in sales', etc.
protocol.rules_placeholder: Write a rule and press Enter...
protocol.rules_example: Example: 'Never use emojis', 'Always reply in English', etc.

providers.title: AI PROVIDERS
providers.subtitle: Phase 1 of 2: Key Collection
providers.hint: Collect only the keys you want to use. You only need 1 configured method (API key or local inference) to operate your Assistant.
providers.ollama_desc: Local Inference. Get Free Cloud Models by creating an account.

credentials.title: CREDENTIALS
credentials.subtitle: Security and Keys
credentials.key_placeholder: Paste the key you obtained here...

telegram.title: TELEGRAM (Optional)
telegram.subtitle: Remote control from anywhere.
telegram.step1: Search for '@BotFather' on Telegram, send /newbot and give it a name.
telegram.step2: Copy the API Token it gives you and paste it in the top field.
telegram.step3: Search for '@userinfobot', press Start and copy your numeric ID.

settings.title: System Configuration
settings.language_desc: Select the global language for mikuBot

orchestration.title: Neural Orchestration Model Routing
orchestration.vision_desc: Leave unconfigured to use native vision capabilities of the active model

security.title: Neural Security & Main Engine Settings
security.vault_desc: Manage master logic fallbacks and encrypted API keys
security.telegram_desc: Link Miku to a Telegram Bot for remote mobile interactions. Leave blank to disable.

vosk.title: Vosk Recognition Engine
vosk.manage_desc: Download and select offline voice recognition models to process your voice messages.

searxena.title: Web Search Engine
searxena.desc: Unlimited searches and extractions with zero API cost. An official NeuralArchLabs project designed for agents requiring sovereign web access without quotas or tracking.
searxena.sync_desc: Use this if you replace searXena files with a newer version to ensure required libraries are installed.

searxena_alerts.installing: ☕ The searXena engine is being installed for the first time. This may take a minute while we configure the Python environment...
searxena_alerts.started_first: 🚀 Environment configured and engine started successfully.
searxena_alerts.stop_confirm: Are you sure you want to stop the searXena engine?

integration.title: System Behavior & OS Integration
integration.mintotray_desc: Closing the app hides it in the tray

backup.title: Neural Maintenance & Backup
backup.subtitle: Neural Workspace Backup
backup.desc: Export a complete copy of your environment (configurations, sessions, scheduled tasks, commands, and skills) in a single compressed file. Ideal for migrations or additional security.
backup.security_desc: The backup file contains your encrypted API Keys and private sessions. Do not share the generated .zip files with untrusted parties.

factory_reset.title: Factory Reset
factory_reset.desc: Reset configuration and re-run the setup wizard from scratch.

alerts.ollama_error_desc: Verify Ollama is active on {{url}} and that at least one model is initialized.

actions.send_instruction_desc: Send as Direct Instruction (Forces tool call)
actions.manual_approval_desc: Manual Approval: EVERY tool needs your OK
actions.auto_approval_desc: Auto-Approval: only dangerous operations ask for permission
actions.safe_mode_on_desc: Safe Mode ON: tools execute one at a time, with output between each
actions.safe_mode_off_desc: Safe Mode OFF: tools execute in batch (faster, higher consumption)

alerts.no_voice_model: ⚠️ No voice model selected. Configure it in Core System settings.
alerts.logs_copied: ✅ Neural Logs: Full history successfully copied to clipboard.

labels.no_data: No raw neural data recorded yet for this session.
labels.link_intermittent: Neural Link Intermittent: Local directories sleeping.

approval.feedback_placeholder: Add instructions, reasons or context for the agent...

library.title: Library Manager
library.desc: Inject additional context into your session

blueprints.title: Assistant Blueprints
blueprints.desc: Pre-built templates for common use cases

actions.empty: No files in library folder. Select a folder in settings or create a file.

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}" from your library?

editor.title: Storage Explorer
editor.standby_desc: Select a file to begin editing

confirm.delete_warning: ⚠️ WARNING: Deleting files from the Cortex or Command paths is a high-risk operation. Removing essential system files or custom commands could break mikuCentral functionality or result in data loss that cannot be undone.
confirm.delete_last: Are you absolutely sure you want to permanently delete "{{filename}}"? This action is irreversible.

actions.reprompt_title: Force agent to continue from where it stopped

scheduler.title: Neural Tasks
scheduler.subtitle: Automate repetitive tasks and system maintenance

fields.name: Task Name
fields.prompt_placeholder: What should the agent do when this task runs? Be specific...
fields.experimental: Experimental: Background execution via neural hooks...
fields.cron_hint: Format: minute hour day month weekday (e.g., 0 8 * * 1-5 = 8am weekdays)
fields.limit_hint: Maximum number of times this task can run per day

empty.title: No scheduled tasks yet
empty.desc: Create a task to get the agent working autonomously
empty.history_desc: Logs will appear here after tasks run

presets_data.morning_prompt: Give me a concise briefing of my pending tasks and anything important I should know today.
presets_data.checkin_prompt: Say hello and ask me how my current progress is going today. Offer direct assistance to continue with whatever I am working on or simply give me a motivational boost.
presets_data.journal_prompt: Ask me how my day went and help me reflect on accomplishments and tomorrow's priorities.
presets_data.heartbeat_prompt: Reply with a short, optimistic message to confirm you are online and operational.
presets_data.radar_prompt: Briefly search the web for the latest AI or tech news and provide a curated summary of main headlines.
presets_data.system_report_prompt: Use local terminal commands to list drives and read CPU/RAM usage, and confirm if there are any performance alerts.
presets_data.weather_prompt: Search the local weather forecast for today and give me practical advice on whether to take an umbrella, coat, or light clothing.
presets_data.weekly_plan_prompt: Ask me a few questions to reflect on my week's progress and help me set key work/school goals for next Monday.
presets_data.curiosity_prompt: Teach me a curious, useful and little-known fact about science, history, or an advanced word in another language.
presets_data.health_ping_prompt: Send me a brief, friendly reminder to drink a glass of water, fix my posture, and rest my eyes from the screen.

type_desc.interval_desc: Configure the task to repeat continuously every certain number of minutes. Ideal for recurrent checks and monitoring (e.g. every 30 mins).
type_desc.once_desc: Configure the task to execute uniquely at an exact temporal instance (specific Date/Time). It will not repeat afterwards.

alerts.telegram_incomplete_desc: To use Telegram as a delivery channel for your scheduled tasks, you must configure your 'Bot Token' and 'Chat ID' in the Core System tab of the mikuCentral settings.

about.description: Personal AI assistant for Windows designed to manage files, perform web searches, and automate tasks using agents. It delivers adaptive hyper-customization and technical sovereignty tailored for every user, integrating system tools for private, high-performance assistance. If you are interested in sponsoring mikuBot or NeuralArchLabs, or sharing your user experience, please contact us through our official channels.
about.author: Author

skills.configure_desc: Assign a unique identifier for deployment
skills.standby_desc: Awaiting selection to initialize neural Pathways
skills.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the skill "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
skills.automatic_desc: Neural parameters are managed dynamically by the core engine.
skills.error_saving: Failed to save skill files, check permissions.

dialogs.restore_confirm:
⚠️ ATTENTION! IMPORTANT

Importing a backup will OVERWRITE ALL your current files in the WorkSpace, including:

• Configurations
• Sessions
• Scheduled tasks
• Commands and skills

This action CANNOT BE UNDONE.

⚠️ ALERT: The process will overwrite existing files without asking again.

Are you SURE you want to continue?
dialogs.restore_success:
✅ Restoration Completed

Your system has been successfully restored. It is recommended to restart the application to apply all changes.
dialogs.factory_reset_first:
⚠️ This will reset the configuration and force the installation wizard.

Your sessions and core files will NOT be deleted, but your paths and preferences will be reset.

Do you want to continue?
dialogs.factory_reset_second:
🔴 FINAL CONFIRMATION

Are you absolutely sure? The application will restart and you must complete the setup again.
dialogs.telegram_cancelled:
⚠️ [Action Cancelled]

An attempt was made to send a message to Telegram (e.g., Scheduled Task), but credentials are missing. Configure the 'Bot Token' and 'Chat ID' in settings.
dialogs.telegram_error:
⚠️ [Telegram Error - Part {{index}}]

Failed to send message: {{error}}
dialogs.voice_model_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the model {{name}}?

✅ Setup Complete!

Your environment is ready. Please go to Settings to link the folders created at {{path}}
